    🎯 Sample Data (For Testing)

    Load sample data to see how the app works with real examples.

    Sample data includes: Properties, Tenants, Employees, Credits, Water Customers, and Transactions

    👥 User Management

    Manage staff accounts via the Super Admin panel. Use SA Panel → Allowlist to add, approve or suspend users.

    Secure your app by setting up user accounts and admin passcode.

    ☁️ Cloud Sync
    🔴 Offline

    📱 Offline Mode Active

    Cloud sync requires HTTPS. Your data is saved locally on this device.

    To enable cloud sync:
    • Upload to GitHub Pages, or
    • Use a local web server (localhost)

    Sign in to sync your data across all devices. Your data will be safely stored in the cloud.

    Data Management

    Backup Data

    Export all data to JSON file

    Restore Data

    Import data from backup file

    🗑️ Clear All Data

    Delete ALL data permanently (local + cloud)

    🧹 Data Health & Cleanup

    Keeps your app fast by removing completed tasks, old voided records, dismissed reminders, and orphan data. Your active records are never touched.

    📦 Storage Used calculating...
    ✅ Completed & Old Tasks
    Tasks completed 30+ days ago
    🔕 Dismissed Reminders
    Notes/reminders already dismissed
    🚫 Voided Transactions
    Voided payments older than 90 days
    📅 Old Water Sale Records
    Water sales older than 1 year
    💸 Old Expense Records
    Expenses older than 1 year
    🎯 Delete Specific Data
    Delete specific category (clears from all devices) — click to expand ▶
